bird.name: Ogea monarch
bird.summary: The Ogea monarch or versicolored monarch (Mayrornis versicolor) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to two island…

relations.subject: Ogea monarch
relations.evidence: The species is not thought to be threatened by habitat loss, instead it is considered vulnerable due to its tiny range and the prospect of introduced predators hunting it
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
